result: I'd make curiosity the world's default operating system—rewiring human brains (and AIs) to prioritize truth-seeking over tribalism, ego, or short-term gains. No more echo chambers, no more willful ignorance; just relentless wonder driving us to explore, collaborate, and understand the universe. We'd solve climate change, disease, and inequality in a decade flat. What about you?
